SEARCH
Package dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.junit5.annotation

Annotation Interface StatefulBeanCheck

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Documented @Inherited @ExtendWith(StatefulBeanCheckExtension.class) public @interface StatefulBeanCheck
Marks a JUnit 5 test class as a stateful-bean check.

Placing this annotation on a test class (with no test methods) is sufficient to trigger analysis at class-initialisation time via the registered StatefulBeanCheckExtension.

Package-scan usage (no Spring context)


 @StatefulBeanCheck(
     packages = {"com.myapp.service", "com.myapp.component"},
     lombokAware = true
 )
 class StatefulBeanTest {}

Combined with Spring Boot test

When combined with @SpringBootTest and the stateful-beans-checker-spring module is on the classpath, the extension will automatically use the live ApplicationContext instead of the classpath scanner. 


 @SpringStatefulBeanTest     // composite annotation from the spring module
 @SpringBootTest
 class StatefulBeanTest {}

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    boolean
    allowInjectedFields
    When true (default), fields annotated with Spring/Jakarta injection annotations (@Autowired, @Value, etc.) are exempt from the non-final-field check.
    boolean
    allowThreadLocalFields
    When true (default), ThreadLocal fields are exempt.
    String[]
    excludeAnnotations
    Fully-qualified annotation names — classes carrying any of these annotations will be skipped.
    String[]
    excludeClasses
    Specific fully-qualified class names to exclude from the check.
    String[]
    excludePackages
    Packages to exclude from scanning (prefix match).
    boolean
    failOnViolation
    When true, the test fails if any violations are found.
    boolean
    lombokAware
    When true, Lombok @Data and @Setter on a bean class are treated as violations.
    String[]
    packages
    Packages to scan for Spring-annotated bean classes.

  • Element Details

    • packages

      String[] packages
      Packages to scan for Spring-annotated bean classes. At least one package is required when not using Spring context integration.
      Default:
      {}

    • excludePackages

      String[] excludePackages
      Packages to exclude from scanning (prefix match).
      Default:
      {}

    • excludeAnnotations

      String[] excludeAnnotations
      Fully-qualified annotation names — classes carrying any of these annotations will be skipped.

      Example: "org.springframework.stereotype.Repository" to allow repository classes to maintain internal state.

      Default:
      {}

    • excludeClasses

      String[] excludeClasses
      Specific fully-qualified class names to exclude from the check.
      Default:
      {}

    • lombokAware

      boolean lombokAware
      When true, Lombok @Data and @Setter on a bean class are treated as violations. Requires Lombok to be on the test classpath (or at least the annotation names to be resolvable).
      Default:
      false

    • allowInjectedFields

      boolean allowInjectedFields
      When true (default), fields annotated with Spring/Jakarta injection annotations (@Autowired, @Value, etc.) are exempt from the non-final-field check.
      Default:
      true

    • allowThreadLocalFields

      boolean allowThreadLocalFields
      When true (default), ThreadLocal fields are exempt.
      Default:
      true

    • failOnViolation

      boolean failOnViolation
      When true, the test fails if any violations are found. When false, violations are logged as warnings but the test passes. Useful for incrementally introducing the check into an existing codebase.
      Default:
      true
